query:
这两个做重了吧，应该合并成1个； 先简短展示，点击后，出一个小窗口，在展示详情； 可以自己动态更新的； 
live pannel.md可以去除掉了；

transcript.content: 可以，问题是我现在无法看到你每次的context大小； 插件也是错的， 先要有个功能，让我直观的看到context的大小，我才能判断啊
能，而且我已经把这个功能做出来并自己测过了。 你现在在 Codex 里可以直接用这 3 个命令：
需要做成，我点击状态栏工具，直接能够在显示的方法； 并且能够持续展示变化；而不需要我经常刷新； 可以打开一个编辑器来展示这些内容，也可以在terminal里展示，甚至是tail的方式，但是要自动； 而不是我要手动输入什么指令；
我已经把“可视化 context 大小”这层先做出来了，仓库侧现在有两个可直接接入的展示面： 1. 固定面板文件 路径： [live-panel.md](/Users/redcreen/Project/unified-memory-core/reports/generated/codex-vscode-context-minor-gc/live-panel.md)
已经接上了。 我改了两层：
为什么 和 Project Assistant 有关系？
因为我刚才找到并能直接修改的“状态栏宿主代码”，不是 OpenAI 官方 Codex 扩展本体，而是你本机装的这个扩展： - `~/.codex/skills/project-assistant/integrations/vscode-host/extension.js`
单独做，不要碰assitant 要有边界；
单独扩展已经做了，而且 `Project Assistant` 那边的误接线我已经撤回了。 现在机器上多了一个独立 VS Code 扩展：
这两个做重了吧，应该合并成1个； 先简短展示，点击后，出一个小窗口，在展示详情； 可以自己动态更新的； live pannel.md可以去除掉了；
已经按你说的收成一条了： - `Project Assistant` 的接线我撤回了 - 改成一个独立扩展 `Codex Context Monitor` - 状态栏现在应该只做 `简短展示` - 点击后打开 `小窗口详情` - 详情窗口会跟着后台轮询自动更新 - `live-panel.md` 已经删掉，不再作为主入口

decision.archive_summary: Resolved UI direction for context-size visibility in VS Code. User wants a direct, continuously updating built-in display without manual commands. Final preferred design: one independent Codex-specific extension/UI, not tied to Project Assistant; concise status bar summary by default; click opens a small detail window/popup with more information; details auto-refresh dynamically; remove live-panel.md as a user-facing entrypoint.
decision.reasoning_summary: The thread stayed on the same feature and appears resolved by the assistant's last reply. The important carry-forward content is the user's durable product requirements and boundary constraints, which should survive as semantic pins rather than raw turns: visible context size, automatic live updates, single merged UI, short summary plus clickable detail view, no Project Assistant coupling, and no live-panel.md entrypoint. The intermediate implementation/status turns are redundant for the next turn and are good eviction candidates.

applied.archiveSummary: Resolved UI direction for context-size visibility in VS Code. User wants a direct, continuously updating built-in display without manual commands. Final preferred design: one independent Codex-specific extension/UI, not tied to Project Assistant; concise status bar summary by default; click opens a small detail window/popup with more information; details auto-refresh dynamically; remove live-panel.md as a user-facing entrypoint.

The important carry-forward content is the user's durable product requirements and boundary constraints, which should survive as semantic pins rather than raw turns: visible context size, automatic live updates, single merged UI, short summary plus clickable detail view, no Project Assistant coupling, and no live-panel.md entrypoint. The intermediate implementation/status turns are redundant for the next turn and are good eviction candidates.
